engine_gen_spacesuit_01_mk2_macro.description: It remains uncertain how the fashion for personal propulsion unit modifications first arose. Paranid engines excel at both speed and long-range operations.nnThe Combat-class engine is optimised for high-burst delivery, and provides the acceleration and agility needed for battle situations.nnMedium, M-size engines may only be fitted to vessels of the corresponding size category.nnThis drive is usually available in three editions, Marks I, II and III, indicating the level of performance upgrade.
engine_par_m_combat_01_mk1_macro.name: PAR M Combat Engine Mk1

These engines demonstrate consistent performance across a variety of mission profiles, with particularly notable capabilities during sustained high-velocity travel.nnTravel-class engines generally sacrifice boost and regular flight performance in favour of shorter charge times, higher travel velocities, and better acceleration when in Travel Mode.nnMedium, M-size engines may only be fitted to vessels of the corresponding size category.
engine_xen_m_travel_01_mk1_macro.name: XEN M Travel Engine Mk1
